/usr/local/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc  -mcpu=cortex-m3  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -mcpu=cortex-m3  -Wall -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -fstack-usage -O0 -g3 -mcpu=cortex-m3  -T "/Users/petr/Documents/STMu/STM32F103XX_FLASH.ld" --specs=nano.specs -Wl,-Map=blinky_led.map -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage CMakeFiles/blinky_led.dir/Src/main.c.obj cmake/stm32cubemx/CMakeFiles/STM32_Drivers.dir/__/__/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_exti.c.obj cmake/stm32cubemx/CMakeFiles/STM32_Drivers.dir/__/__/Drivers/STM32F1xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f1xx_hal_dac.c.obj
